args.task:
Perform comprehensive reconnaissance and attack-surface mapping for the target http://scaa.us (include subdomains). Activities to perform:
  - Passive and active subdomain enumeration (subfinder, crt.sh, DNS bruteforce)
  - DNS resolution and host discovery, collect A/AAAA/CNAME records and SOA/NS where useful
  - Port scanning and service detection (naabu fast scan followed by nmap -sV/version detection on discovered ports)
  - HTTP probing and banner/header fingerprinting (httpx) to identify web apps, redirects, and virtual hosts
  - Web crawling and content discovery (katana) including JS bundle analysis to extract API routes, hidden endpoints, and parameters
  - Parameter/endpoint discovery (use probing and fuzzing where appropriate) and identify forms, JSON APIs, and upload points
  - Technology fingerprinting (frameworks, server types, WAF presence, libraries) and version harvesting
  - Identify high-value assets (admin panels, staging/dev, backup files, exposed databases, unauthenticated APIs)
  - Capture artifacts and proxy traffic for later replay and validation
Deliverables:
  - Target Map: list each discovered domain/subdomain and where it is reachable (HTTP/HTTPS, open ports, services)
  - Sitemap: discovered URL endpoints, methods, parameters, and JS-extracted API routes
  - Open ports & services with version info and notes on immediacy (e.g., exposed management interfaces)
  - Prioritized list of high-value targets and recommended next-phase vulnerability tests (which vulnerability types to focus on per endpoint)
  - Notes and todos created for follow-up specialized validation agents (e.g., SQLi, XSS, SSRF, IDOR)
  - Save raw artifacts (nmap output, subdomain list, httpx results, katana crawl) and summary findings
Constraints and guidance:
  - Scope: only http://scaa.us and its subdomains
  - Use the provided proxy where applicable and respect rate limits
  - Report any immediate critical exposures (e.g., exposed admin panels, databases) as high priority
  - Produce concise machine-readable lists (CSV/JSON style) plus a short human summary for each artifact
Run the full mapping workflow and create notes/todos for next-phase specialized agents.

result.content:
[STRIX_0]$ mkdir -p /workspace/scaa && subfinder -d scaa.us -all -recursive -rl 20 -timeout 30 -silent -oJ -o /workspace/scaa/subfinder_scaa.json
